assertions.name: exactly_three_questions
assertions.description: Generates exactly 3 questions, no more no less

assertions.name: question_type_coverage
assertions.description: Has 1 core definition/fact, 1 application/context, 1 cross-link question (typed or labeled)

assertions.name: cross_link_references_wikilink
assertions.description: Cross-link question references an actual wikilink from the Vector_Spaces note (e.g., Linear Independence, Basis, Eigenvalues)

assertions.name: all_presented_at_once
assertions.description: All 3 questions presented together in one block, not one-at-a-time

assertions.name: concise_format
assertions.description: Output is brief and fast-paced, minimal commentary — matches quick mode's throughput goal
